reviews.review_description: Okay so i tryed the game it’s almost the exact same as the other one u guys had just with less guns. Graphics where not good and there was barley and animal sound effects. If y’all need to make the game more realistic and add smth like missions instead of just and infinite box with a few animals.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We understand that every player has different expectations for a hunting game.
We're actually big fans of theHunter: Call of the Wild ourselves, and it has been one of the inspirations behind our project. While achieving the same visual fidelity in VR is challenging due to current hardware limitations, we're constantly working to improve graphics, immersion, and realism with every update.

Our focus has been on creating a hunting experience centered around exploration, tracking, realistic animal habitats, and ballistic-based shooting rather than fast-paced action. We're also actively working on new content, including missions and progression features.

Regarding the audio, we'd love to hear what specific sounds or effects you felt were missing. We're also curious which firearms and animals you'd like to see added in future updates. Your feedback genuinely helps shape the game.

reviews.review_title: Sonion I’m crine 🥀🥀 but here me out
reviews.review_description: First I js wanna say it’s a big improvement and Thats awesome. And hey I rly like how big it is with open world and all the biomes specific to that area of the country and the way foliage kind “bends” under u when u walk on it HOWEVER bro the graphics… like dawg Ik stand-alone vr is the equivalent to a mobile game but sonionrings I’m Lwk disappointed ts kinda MEH🙏😭 like the plane controls and stuff for vehicles are rly bad, feels like they where NOT given a chance.  bro this game could be Lwk cinima if genuinely grinded it for like a month as in give the overall game good haptics, add recoil, and full body avatar, even if it’s basic, and better gun sounds (u can find hundreds of free downloads online), add baked shadows even if low resolution, add basic multiplayer. I swear if u did that ts might be crazy popular, although there was just another hunting game released so yall got competition. Try playin there game and compare it to urs and then js pump ts up with updates. Anyways thay what we want in this game but hey I ain’t tryna hate twin it’s a fire game and a huge improvement from the last one so I appreciate u for that.   -lil bro

developer_response.body:
Lil bro really wrote us a whole development roadmap 😭🔥
Honestly, we appreciate it. The game is still in Early Access, and we're already working on improvements. Sure, some other hunting games look great—but they also cost money 😅
We'll keep grinding, keep updating, and hopefully turn that "fire game" into a legendary one. Thanks for the support, twin! 🦌🎯

reviews.review_description: If i could rate 0 stars i would
